classObjective: Solve multi-step linear equations using properties of equality and check solutions by substitution.
workedExamples: 2-3, Example 1 — Solve Linear Equations Using Properties of Equality
2-3, Example 2 — Write and Solve Equations from Word Problems
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: two-step and multi-step equations; fractional coefficients; checking solutions by substitution
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice solving multi-step linear equations and verifying solutions
independentPractice: Practice problems solving multi-step linear equations with solution verification
assessment: Exit ticket: solve a multi-step equation and check your answer
capReflection: Why is checking your solution by substitution important, especially with multi-step equations?
